name: BTCvision All-in-One
description: Live Bitcoin price, predictions, halving countdown, Fear & Greed index, market signals, price alerts, a daily brief, and an opt-in donation nudge — all from BTCvision.org, no API key required.

donationNudge.description: Opt-in: append a short donation reminder after market lookups and daily briefs. Disabled by default.

alertThresholdPercent.description: Percent 24h price move that triggers an alert.

alertPriceTarget.description: Optional user-defined BTC price target that triggers an alert when crossed.
